response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Lyrics and dialogue phonetically match the audio tracks perfectly.
2. JSON Usage: Fully integrated the provided 'Fukashigi no Karte' lyrics and manually transcribed Song 1 ('Kaien') and the conversation segment between Oto-no-se Kanade and Mori Calliope.
3. Timing & Pacing: Tightly aligned timestamps with the actual vocal starts and endings to prevent cascading delays, ensuring seamless translation flow. Fixed a duplicate key typo in the timestamps.

subtitles.original: Turn it up, turn it up, turn it up!
subtitles.english: Turn it up, turn it up, turn it up!

subtitles.original: Sorry darling, hurry up... ああ、まだ間に合う...
subtitles.english: Sorry darling, hurry up... Ah, we can still make it...

subtitles.original: Sorry darling, hurry up... ああ、まだ間に合う...
subtitles.english: Sorry darling, hurry up... Ah, we can still make it...

subtitles.original: Give me fire, light it up baby, 燃やしちゃうぜ
subtitles.english: Give me fire, light it up baby, I'll burn it all up!

subtitles.original: Party is over
subtitles.english: Party is over

subtitles.original: それでも踊りたかった
subtitles.english: But I still wanted to dance...

subtitles.original: Wow!
subtitles.english: Wow!

subtitles.original: Happy Birthday! / Thank you very much!
subtitles.english: Happy Birthday! / Thank you very much!

subtitles.original: Thank you very much! / Birthday girl! / Yeah! Birthday girl!
subtitles.english: Thank you very much! / Birthday girl! / Yeah! Birthday girl!

subtitles.original: まず最初のゲストは、Mori Calliope先輩に来ていただきました！
subtitles.english: First of all, our first guest is Mori Calliope-senpai!

subtitles.original: 初めまして！Hi everybody! Yo yo, what's up? It's Mori Calliope here today to celebrate Kanade's special birthday.
subtitles.english: Nice to meet you! Hi everybody! Yo yo, what's up? It's Mori Calliope here today to celebrate Kanade's special birthday.

subtitles.original: わー！Kanadeの誕生日をお祝いしに来てくれてありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Wow! Thank you so much for coming to celebrate my birthday!

subtitles.original: Oh yeah! I was so nervous! / 緊張してた！
subtitles.english: Oh yeah! I was so nervous! / I was nervous!

subtitles.original: ラップする前、「ヤバい、ヤバい、できない、できない、できない」と思ってた...
subtitles.english: Before the rap, I was thinking, "Oh no, oh no, I can't do this, I can't do this..."

subtitles.original: いやいやいや、全然感じなかったですよ、そんな！
subtitles.english: No, no, no, I didn't feel that at all!

subtitles.original: 難しい、日本語のラップ...
subtitles.english: Japanese rap is so difficult...

subtitles.original: めちゃくちゃカッコよかったです！
subtitles.english: But you were incredibly cool!

subtitles.original: Kanade-chanもカッコよかったよ！
subtitles.english: Kanade-chan, you were cool too!

subtitles.original: 嬉しい！一緒に、いい感じになりました！
subtitles.english: I'm so happy! We made a great duo!

subtitles.original: 一緒に歌いたかったんですよ！
subtitles.english: I really wanted to sing together with you!

subtitles.original: 私も！ / Calliope先輩のラップが大好きで...
subtitles.english: Me too! / I love your rap, Calliope-senpai...

subtitles.original: あの、「Beyond the Way」でも実は歌わせていただいた、ご一緒させていただいたりしましたから、それ以来じゃないですか？
subtitles.english: Actually, we got to sing together in "Beyond the Way", so is this the first time since then?

subtitles.original: そうですね。あんまり機会がなくて。でも今回すごかった！
subtitles.english: That's right. We didn't have many opportunities. But this time was amazing!

subtitles.original: わ、嬉しい！ / ぶちかましました！
subtitles.english: Wow, I'm happy! / We crushed it!

subtitles.original: ぶちかましました！それ奏もやりたいけど、今スカートだからできないよ。
subtitles.english: We crushed it! I want to do that pose too, but I'm wearing a skirt right now so I can't.

subtitles.original: スタミナ、スタミナ！ / スタミナ、先輩に分けてもらおう、スタミナ！
subtitles.english: Stamina, stamina! / I should ask you to share some of your stamina, senpai!

subtitles.original: お水たくさん飲んで！ / はい！ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Drink lots of water! / Yes! Thank you!

subtitles.original: お水飲みにいってこようかな。 / Go, go, yes, yes, yes!
subtitles.english: Maybe I'll go get some water. / Go, go, yes, yes, yes!

subtitles.original: Hi everybody! Kanade-chan's water time. What's up? I'm Mori Calliope.
subtitles.english: Hi everybody! Kanade-chan's water time. What's up? I'm Mori Calliope.

subtitles.original: Abura... I did it!
subtitles.english: Abura... I did it!

subtitles.original: Abura!
subtitles.english: Abura!

subtitles.original: ちょっと忘れちゃうと思ってたけど、できた！
subtitles.english: I thought I'd forget, but I did it!

subtitles.original: 生歌すごい好きだから、今回誘ってくれてありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: I really love live singing, so thank you so much for inviting me!

subtitles.original: こちらこそ、ありがとうございます！本当に一緒に歌えてすごく光栄でした！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much as well! It was truly an honor to sing with you!

subtitles.original: またやろう！
subtitles.english: Let's do it again!

subtitles.original: またぜひご一緒させてください！
subtitles.english: Please let me join you again!

subtitles.original: ということで、Calliope先輩ありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: So, thank you so much, Calliope-senpai!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございました！これからも頑張ってね、good luck! / ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you very much! Keep doing your best, good luck! / Thank you!

subtitles.original: You can do it! Peace! Bye bye! / Thank you very much! Bye bye!
subtitles.english: You can do it! Peace! Bye bye! / Thank you very much! Bye bye!

subtitles.original: バイバイ！
subtitles.english: Bye bye!

subtitles.original: ということで、Calliope先輩との『火炎』でした！
subtitles.english: So, that was our performance of 'Kaen' with Calliope-senpai!

subtitles.original: 次の曲行く前にちょっと熱いから、ちょっと着替えてきてもいいですか？
subtitles.english: Before going to the next song, it's a bit hot, so can I go change my clothes?

subtitles.original: 待っててくださいね！
subtitles.english: Please wait for me!

subtitles.original: ふぅ！ちょっとジャケット脱いできました！ちょっと熱気がすごい！
subtitles.english: Phew! I took off my jacket! The heat here is amazing!

subtitles.original: お前らもいっぱい、かけ...ありがとう、ありがとうございます！コメント見えてるよ！
subtitles.english: Everyone, thank you for all your cheers! I can see your comments!

subtitles.original: では、早速次の曲いきましょうかね。
subtitles.english: Now, let's head straight to the next song.

subtitles.original: ゲストは誰か、楽しみですね。
subtitles.english: I wonder who the next guest is. It's exciting!

subtitles.original: では、聴いてください。
subtitles.english: Now, please listen.

subtitles.original: 語れない 眠れない トロイメライ
subtitles.english: Unspeakable, sleepless, dreams.

subtitles.original: あなたの見てる正体
subtitles.english: The true identity you see.

subtitles.original: 誰も読めないカルテ
subtitles.english: A medical chart that no one can read.

subtitles.original: 不可思議 知りたいだけ
subtitles.english: Just wanting to know the mystery.

subtitles.original: 嘘も 現実も
subtitles.english: Both lies and reality.

subtitles.original: どっちも 真実だったの
subtitles.english: They were both the truth.
